name: com.brassworks.sidecar.weapon-mechanisms-set04
description: Unity-only sidecar package for componentized steampunk first-person weapon mechanisms, including coils, gauges, receiver plates, grips, pressure tanks, ammo cylinders, rails, muzzle crowns, glove silhouettes, and material realism swatches.
